Document:
# Roundflow
Every round of Ephemeral Space is a [bold]self-contained shift[/bold] that takes place on our map, Research Station Toast. You and your fellow crew wake up from hypersleep aboard the arrivals shuttle, quickly learning of your terrible luck: a radiation storm is approaching the station, you can't cancel the arrival flight, and you don't have enough fuel to FTL away. Perhaps the true purpose of the station as a telescience research vessel provides an answer on how to escape...
Rounds typically last from [color=cyan]45 to 70 minutes[/color], with a hard cap around ~70 minutes due to the radiation storm.
## Wins and Losses
On Ephemeral Space, the emergency shuttle does not exist, and rounds have much more of a defined flow. Rather than rounds going on until people get bored, each [textlink="troupe" link="TroupesAndMasks"] in the round has a set of objectives and win condition. If none are met in time, the [bold]radiation storm[/bold] heading towards the station will arrive, killing all organic life onboard and ending the round in a fail state for all troupes.
You can check your mask, troupe, and objectives in your [bold]Character Menu[/bold], accessed with [keybind="OpenCharacterMenu"].
## Navigation Research Station Toast has a wide variety of locations to visit. These range from specific departments where work happens to common areas where you can relax and chat with others about the state of the round.
[color=cyan]Station maps[/color] give you an overview of the entire station with colored markers denoting locations of different things. Regular [color=cyan]signs[/color] on walls can point you to different departments.
## More Info Still don't understand what this server is actually about? [textlink="Check the new players guide" link="NewPlayer"]
Learning the controls? [textlink="Click here to read about the different controls" link="Controls"]
Don't know how to perform a job? [textlink="Click here to jump to a list of jobs" link="Jobs"]
Keep dying? [textlink="Click here to see a survival guide" link="Survival"]
